headline: Jim Cramer Says “I Do Want to Own Eaton”
summary: Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer evaluated, along with the fragile food market. When a caller asked about the stock, Cramer said: Well, you know, it’s funny if it were, you know, this is a silly asterisk if it were not for the war, but I think because of the […]
